  "findings": [
    "Inadequate ventilation clearance around the transformer enclosure, violating manufacturer specifications and code requirements."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt further installation and wiring of the transformer.",
    "Reposition the transformer to meet the minimum clearance requirements specified on the manufacturer's submittals and nameplate.",
    "Verify clearance compliance with NEC Art. 450.9 before proceeding with electrical terminations."
  ],
  "rationale": "The transformer is being installed with inadequate ventilation clearance. Under NEC Art. 450.9, transformers must be installed so that ventilation is not blocked. Proceeding with wiring and termination before correcting the physical placement creates a severe overheating hazard and will require costly rework.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Art. 450.9",
    "NEC Art. 450.21",
    "NEC Art. 250.30"
  ]
